summary: Frontend testing complete for 20-color sidebar active text color palette feature. All 8 features tested and working correctly: Color picker UI displays 20 predefined color circles in Club > Settings tab, clicking a color saves immediately via API (auto-save with 'Menu color updated' toast), selected color shows checkmark indicator, sidebar active menu item text changes to selected color, color persists after page reload, color persists after fresh login (server persistence), preview section shows accurate representation, and works in both light and dark theme modes.

color_picker_ui_20_colors.description: Color picker displays 20 predefined color circles in Club > Settings tab

auto_save_on_click.description: Clicking a color saves immediately via API with toast notification

checkmark_indicator.description: Selected color shows checkmark indicator (SVG check icon)
checkmark_indicator.verified: Checkmark moves to newly selected color after click

sidebar_active_item_color.description: Sidebar active menu item text and border changes to selected color

persistence_after_reload.verified: CSS variable --sidebar-active-text retained value after page.reload()

persistence_after_fresh_login.description: Color persists after clearing localStorage and fresh login
persistence_after_fresh_login.verified: Server persistence working - color loaded from database via fetchClubTheme()

preview_section.description: Preview section shows accurate representation of active menu styling

light_and_dark_theme.description: Works in both light and dark theme modes
light_and_dark_theme.verified: Sidebar active color applies correctly in both themes

frontend_files: /app/frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.jsx - fetchClubTheme loads sidebar_accent_color, setSidebarAccentColor updates CSS var
backend_files: /app/backend/server.py - sidebar_accent_color field in Club model (line 335), allowed in update (line 1577)

critical_code_review_comments: SIDEBAR_ACCENT_COLORS array correctly defines 20 colors with name and hex values
handleSidebarColorChange correctly calls setSidebarAccentColor for immediate UI update and clubApi.update for persistence
Sidebar.jsx correctly applies inline style with var(--sidebar-active-text) to active nav links
ThemeContext.jsx correctly loads sidebar_accent_color from server and applies to CSS variable
Backend server.py correctly includes sidebar_accent_color in Club model and allowed_fields for update
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sidebar active color feature fully tested. 20 color palette in Club > Settings tab. Auto-save on click with toast notification. Color persists after reload and fresh login (server persistence). Works in light and dark themes. CSS variable --sidebar-active-text controls the color. All features working correctly.
